description: The main objective of this pipeline is to output the measurements from the extraction of pairwise statistics between the 2D ROI, starting from the conversion of TrackMate spots into ROI. The pipeline starts with the input of TrackMate spots, which are then converted into ROI by the trackmate-spots-to-roi node, processed by the ij1-roi-relation-2d node, and finally output by the jipipe:compartment-output node.

6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.name: ij1-roi-relation-2d
6d30c68f-8849-4891-bd93-eca41b9a042e.description:
Extracts all pairwise statistics between the 2D ROI

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
